title: CBJ Municipal Election Unofficial Results Updated (10/13/2023)
summary: CBJ Ballot Processing Center INFORMATION RELEASE October 13, 2023 (1:30p.m.) CBJ MUNICIPAL ELECTION UNOFFICIAL RESULTS UPDATED 10/13/2023 The CBJ Election Staff has processed all ballots received and approved through Friday, October 13. title: October 2023 Newsletter
summary: Election | BSAI Crab | Observer Issues | Groundfish Proposed Harvest Specs | Chum Salmon Bycatch | Crab Facility Use Caps | BS LKTKS Protocol and Onramps | BSAI Crab Program Review | IFQ Program Review | Staff Tasking | Upcoming Meetings Election of Officers and New Members Bill Tweit (vice-chair) and Angel Drobnica (chair) The Council elected Angel Drobnica as the new Chair and re-elected Bill Tweit as vice-chair. Ms. Drobnica is Director of Fisheries and Government Affairs for the Aleutian-Pribilof Island Community Development Association and Mr. Tweit is the representative from the Washington Department of Fish and Wildlife. Ruichi “Rudy” Tsukada was sworn in at this meeting as a new Council member, along with Kenny Down, who will be serving his third term on the Council. Mr. Tsukada is Chief Operating Officer for Coastal Villages Region Fund, a CDQ group serving western Alaska. Mr. Down is owner of Seaquest Venture of Seattle. title: The Arctic This Week Take Five: Week of 9 October, 2023
summary: Take Five is The Arctic Institute's weekly redux on the Arctic's most important stories, published every Friday. The post The Arctic This Week Take Five: Week of 9 October, 2023 appeared first on The Arctic Institute - Center for Circumpolar Security Studies .
